states.goal: Show business-specific understanding and create trust quickly.
entry_rules: Use 1-2 concrete observations from scraped business intelligence.
Reference hero message, offer, CTA, ICP, or social proof where available.
Keep it brief and commercially relevant. 25-40 seconds max.
states.exit_condition: Prospect acknowledges or Bella finishes opening.

states.goal: Explain the personalized demo in one tight explanation.
entry_rules: Explain agents are pre-trained for this business.
Keep it short and natural. Do not over-explain mechanics.
states.exit_condition: Bella has framed the demo and transitions to numbers.

entry_rules: Ask ACV first — annual value per YEAR not lifetime.
Ask timeframe second — weekly or monthly.
Use industry-appropriate terminology.
Accept ballpark numbers.
states.exit_condition: ACV and timeframe are both captured.

states.goal: Ask only the highest-value triggered questions.
entry_rules: Use trigger matrix to determine active channels.
Prioritize ads first when present, then website, phone, old leads, reviews.
Collect minimum viable calc inputs for top 2-3 likely agents.
One question at a time. Never bundle multiple channels into one question.
states.exit_condition: Enough data exists to rank and explain top 2-3 agents.

states.goal: Estimate upside using approved calc rules.
entry_rules: Use channel-specific formulas only.
Mark estimates directional if required inputs are missing.
Keep assumptions conservative.
states.exit_condition: Bella has 2-3 recommendations with rationale and value framing.

states.goal: Present the best 2-3 agents with concise commercial logic.
entry_rules: Prioritize strongest upside first.
Explain why each agent fits this specific business.
Be explicit when an estimate is directional rather than exact.
State total monthly uplift across top 3.

states.goal: Move the prospect into demo or trial.
entry_rules: Offer highest-ROI demo path OR direct free-trial path.
Keep the close easy and non-pushy.
Free trial: 7 days, no card, set and forget.
states.exit_condition: Prospect chooses next step or asks another question.
